signs. Aries and Libra refer to the brain, head, and muscles.
Taurus and Scorpio speak about the throat, bronchial tubes,
neck, shoulders, mucous membranes, and glands. Gemini and
Sagittarius tell us about lungs, arms, hands and nerves. Can-

Directions: Preliminaries 93
cer and Capricorn indicate the heart, stomach, trunk of the
body, and bones. Leo and Aquarius speak of the kidneys,
lumbar region, and the skin. The remaining two signs refer to
the bowels, legs, feet and blood.
In the light of this informations see whether the chart
erected for the given time fits the situation. It is not very
helpful to see that the ascendant agrees with the situation,
because the ascendant may be spread over two hours. Even
then one must be able to distinguish the dominant features of
each sign as the ascendant. The features indicated by one sign
are to a large extent different from the one proceeding it and
from the one succeeding it. Having ascertained the ascendant
